title: I found a easy side hustle!!!
author: Legal_Ambition_5485
selftext: You can make a minimum of 2 dollars a day = 62 dollars a month if you are willing to invest 100$ or (minimum 30$) its a ai trading bot you dont need any experience to use it, just let the bot do the work. The only thing you need is revolut account and the app you can get it by scanning the QR code. If you know any friends or family that also want to invest you can even make more money so its a simple side hustle it wont make you rich but hey money is money. Im also willing to help anyone for free to get into it just message me or at me on discord. @paapas67
